name: chatroom
description: 跨网段聊天室 - 支持 Web 和移动端 App

scripts.install-clamav: apt-get install clamav clamav-daemon || echo '请手动安装ClamAV: https://www.clamav.net/downloads'
scripts.cap:android: npx cap add android && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:ios: npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:build: npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build: echo 'Web 应用无需构建，直接使用 public 目录'
